data.title: InCoax first to implement eQoS for MoCA Access in D-series platform
data.description: In Lund, Sweden on April 9, 2026, InCoax Networks announced the integration of enhanced Quality of Service (eQoS) into its D-series DPU platform, making it the pioneer in introducing eQoS to MoCA Access. This upgrade features advanced capabilities such as improved bandwidth distribution, classification of traffic, and management of congestion.

data.title: AVAX price at $9.04 eyes $9.65 resistance by mid-April. Neutral RSI at 47.88 indicates potential drop to $8.61 support.
data.description: The current price of Avalanche is $9.04, while the Relative Strength Index (RSI) stands at 47.88, indicating a neutral stance. Based on technical analysis, there is a possibility of the cryptocurrency testing the resistance level at $9.65 or falling to the support level at $8.61 in the next 1-2 weeks.

data.title: Matmut Group: Full Year 2025 results: Growth, diversification and financial strength - On track with 2025 strategic ambitions
data.description: Matmut Group is making significant progress towards achieving its strategic ambitions for 2025, focusing on growth, diversification, and financial stability. The company is aiming to expand its operations and enhance its offerings to meet the evolving needs of its customers. With a strong emphasis on financial strength, Matmut Group is well-positioned to achieve its growth targets. The company's dedication to its strategic goals underscores its commitment to success and sustainability.

data.title: Canary Capital files for US-based PEPE ETF, as the token trades 85% below its December 2024 peak.
data.description: Canary Capital is gearing up to introduce an Exchange-Traded Fund (ETF) that will monitor the price of Pepe's token. This comes as the token currently trades at a significant 85% lower than its peak value reached in December 2024.

data.description: According to a panel of judges from the District of Columbia Court of Appeals, they believe that the government has the favorable equitable balance in this case.

data.title: BTC surpasses $72K with $280M shorts liquidated amid 'fragile truce' post US-Iran ceasefire, as markets surge. Bears hesistant to close positions.
data.description: Following the announcement of a ceasefire between the US and Iran, both Bitcoin and global markets experienced a surge. However, data reveals that the majority of Bitcoin bears have not yet closed their positions. This resulted in Bitcoin's value rising by (percentage increase) and the global markets (specify index) also saw a (percentage increase) increase. Despite the positive market movement, it appears that bearish sentiment still lingers among Bitcoin traders.

data.title: New enforcement chief David Woodcock appointed by US SEC amidst concerns over predecessor's departure. Senators seek answers on dropped lawsuits against Justin Sun & crypto firms.
data.description: David Woodcock has assumed the position as investigations continue on the US senators' inquiries about the agency's decision to dismiss lawsuits against Justin Sun and multiple crypto firms.

data.title: New US Treasury GENIUS Act rules aim to combat illicit finance:Payment stablecoin issuers must set up AML/CFT programs and have power to block transactions.
data.description: According to a new proposed rule, payment stablecoin issuers will be required to set up anti-money laundering (AML), countering the financing of terrorism (CFT), and sanctions compliance programs. Additionally, they must have the capability to restrict, freeze, and decline specific transactions. This directive aims to enhance regulatory oversight in the stablecoin industry and ensure compliance with financial security measures.

data.title: Bitcoin aiming for $90K with aggressive buying surge on Binance, data suggests buyers taking control of volumes.
data.description: Recent data reveals a surge in Bitcoin trading on Binance, indicating a rise in buying activities. Investors are now eyeing a price target of $90,000 for BTC, suggesting growing confidence in the cryptocurrency's potential.
